title: Awards & Recognition
seoDescription: Honours and recognition received by the Centre for Plant Medicine Research and its people — verified institutional listing.
lede: CPMR recognises excellence in plant medicine research, service delivery, and public health impact. Awards listed here are published as verified by the Centre's communications office.

awards.title: National Research Excellence Award (example)
awards.awardingBody: Ministry of Environment, Science, Technology and Innovation (example)
awards.summary: Recognised for sustained contribution to ethnobotanical research and quality-assured herbal product development.

awards.title: Laboratory quality systems commendation (example)
awards.summary: Acknowledgement of documented quality management practices in analytical laboratories.

awards.title: Community health outreach recognition
awards.summary: Honour received for public education and clinic outreach programmes — awarding body to be confirmed in full citation.
